name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Chestnut?=
subject: Inauguration on Monday!
body:
Peter,

Inauguration is only a few days away! We are so excited to celebrate the hard work and dedication of volunteers and supporters around the state, and begin taking Missouri in a new direction. I wanted to drop you a note and give you some information about the logistics of that day, in case you are planning on attending.

First of all, if you have yet to get your invitation and would like to attend, or you have any questions about the inaugural ceremonies, please call (573) 283-3950. We'd be happy to sign you up or answer any questions!

One question we've gotten a lot is: "what should I wear?" During the day, wear whatever you want. Just dress warm, because it may be chilly and the inauguration is outdoors. At the ball, our dress code is "Black Tie or Boots." You can come in a tux or gown, which is the traditional attire. Or you can just wear whatever is most comfortable for you. Tickets to the ceremony and ball are totally free! We'd love you to come, just call (573) 283-3950 to RSVP.

Come by and get your tickets at the Capitol Plaza Hotel in Jefferson City at one of the following times:
Friday, January 6th: 4pm-7pm
Saturday, January 7th: 11am-7pm
Sunday, January 8th: 11am-7pm
Monday, January 9th: 7am-10:30am

Tickets are free, but you will need one to get in!

If you're planning on driving to the inaugural ceremonies from somewhere else around the state, as thousands are, you should know that we've already reserved some rooms for inauguration attendees that you are welcome to use. But those rooms are filling up quickly! To get a room at the Wingate by Wyndham Columbia (3101 Wingate Ct, Columbia, MO 65201) You simply need to call (573) 817-0500 and reserve your rooms under the block of "Eric Greitens".

We're also excited to announce that Uber will be providing **free rides** to anyone in the Jefferson City area from 7:00 AM to 2:00 AM on Inauguration Day! Just download the Uber app from the App Store on your smart phone and request a ride anywhere in the Jefferson City area.

It's going to be a great inauguration day! If you want to see the schedule, frequently asked questions, and other details, please visit [NewMissouri.org](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=140128cbaa&e=84041254e6). We're expecting thousands to show up and celebrate as we begin the hard work necessary to bring more jobs, higher pay, safer streets, and better schools to our state. We hope you'll join us!

Best,
Catherine Chestnut
Executive Director
A Committee for a New Missouri, Inc
PO Box #1422
Jefferson City, Missouri 65102
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=f5fc197451&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=233786a099&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=bd1dd1aaee), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@newmissouri.org](mailto:team@newmissouri.org). You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=b64bf4ae55&e=84041254e6) with us!

name: Donna Brazile
subject: re: shady business
body:
Be prepared to fight back
---
**The Republican Congress is going to try and get away with anything they can with Donald Trump as president. So it's up to us as Democrats to hold them accountable:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Hold-Congress-Accountable1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170106_db_nd&source=em_20170106_db_nd")**
Friend --

The new Congress hadn't even been sworn in, and House Republicans had already started their shady business by trying to gut the Office of Congressional Ethics. Thanks to our Democratic leadership in Congress and thousands of supporters like you who tweeted, signed our petition, and got on the phone with your representatives to put House Republicans on notice, they have put aside their plan... for now.

If this is any indication of how the 115th Congress is going to be, we've got our work cut out for us.

We have to spend the next two years not only fighting back against the GOP and their agenda, but also gearing up for midterm elections next year so we can take back control of Congress. This is a collective effort, and we cannot do any of this without your support.

**Add your name to say that you're standing with us and ready to fight:**

**[http://my.democrats.org/Hold-Congress-Accountable](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Hold-Congress-Accountable1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+httpmydemocratsorgHoldCongressAccountabl&utm_campaign=em_20170106_db_nd&source=em_20170106_db_nd")**

Thanks,

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c183/4067b0a/236036c9e/7e79ffa1/3885039045/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170106_db_nd&source=em_20170106_db_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c183/4067b0a/236036c9e/7e79ffae/3885039045/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170106_db_nd&source=em_20170106_db_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c183/4067b0a/236036c9e/7e79ffaf/3885039045/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170106_db_nd&source=em_20170106_db_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c183/4067b0a/236036c9e/7e79ffac/3885039045/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170106_db_nd&source=em_20170106_db_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Win a trip to join me at the Inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I want you to witness history. |

Friend, You believed in our movement when no one else did. You are the reason we will Make America Great Again! Which is why I’d love you to be there when we make it official, and I’m humbly sworn in as your 45th president. Contribute $3 BEFORE January 13 at 11:59pm to be automatically entered for a chance to win a trip to Washington, D.C., to join me for our Inauguration. The entire world will be watching that day. But let me be clear: they will not be watching me. They will be watching us. They will be watching a new chapter in American history unfold. They will be watching a movement of free people reclaim their independence. They will be watching us unite as one people, saluting one American flag, ready to deliver real change for our country. This isn’t my inauguration. It’s ours. When I raise my right hand to take the Oath of Office, I will be doing it in honor of the forgotten men and women of our country, who banded together to usher in a historic victory last November. Friend: I’ll be doing it for you. I hope to see you there on this historic day. Enter now to win a trip to witness our historic Inauguration on January 20, 2017. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President-Elect of the United States ENTER NOW

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here. Entries must be received between January 5, 2016 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on January 18, 2016 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: Round trip airfare for the winner and one guest to Washington, D.C., hotel accommodations for two (2) nights for the winner and one guest and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor (approximate retail value $3,000). In addition, although the Presidential Swearing-In Ceremony is not part of the official prize package, Trump Make America Great Again Committee will have access to tickets. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915. This Sweepstakes is not affiliated with the 58th Presidential Inaugural Committee.
Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
Unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email

name: DSCC Breaking News
subject: Stand with Planned Parenthood [PETITION]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
First, Senate Republicans attacked Obamacare, then Paul Ryan launched an all-out assault against Planned Parenthood. Sign the petition to fight back NOW! [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed15/2b07114c/41d369e5/73680234/3901708985/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/pp?source=PT-20170106-Breaking-ProsHV")
---
_**PAUL RYAN: GOP WILL DEFUND PLANNED PARENTHOOD (CNN)**_
[**Outrageous! Sign on to protect Planned Parenthood at all costs >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed15/2b07114c/41d369e5/73680234/3901708985/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/pp?source=PT-20170106-Breaking-ProsHV")
Friend -- When it wasn't enough to attack Obamacare in the start of the new Congress, Republicans decided they'd defund Planned Parenthood along with it.

So not only will 30 million Americans face losing their health insurance --**but millions of women could be denied access to affordable care that Planned Parenthood provides. **

**[We need to show Congress who stands with Planned Parenthood ASAP, Friend. Can we count on you to join Democrats in the fight to protect affordable care?](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed15/2b07114c/41d369e5/73680234/3901708985/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/pp?source=PT-20170106-Breaking-ProsHV")**

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name** : Friend
**Last Petition Signed** : N/A
**I Stand with Planned Parenthood:**[**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed15/2b07114c/41d369e5/73680234/3901708985/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/pp?source=PT-20170106-Breaking-ProsHV")

Every step of the way, we need grassroots Democrats on board to fight against Republican extremism.

**The GOP has NO mandate to remove lifesaving services for women and families, and we 're going to push back to prove it. **

**[Friend, we need to send a message to Congress NOW: Add your name to show you stand with Planned Parenthood in the fight to protect affordable care>>](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed15/2b07114c/41d369e5/73680234/3901708985/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/pp?source=PT-20170106-Breaking-ProsHV")**

Thanks,
Team DSCC

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170106-Breaking-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed15/2b07114c/41d369e5/73680236/3901708985/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed15/2b07114c/41d369e5/73680231/3901708985/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed15/2b07114c/41d369e5/73680230/3901708985/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Team Holcomb
subject: Final Reminder: You're invited to a shoot hoops with Governor-elect Eric Holcomb
body:
You are cordially invited to shoot hoops with Governor-elect Eric Holcomb and to take a tour of the historic Hinkle Fieldhouse on January 8th. | | | | | | | |
---|---|---
| | | | [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/4f45291fad6243c4a708266baad27430?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=6d529913ef8b449b9756d432ed6f2de8)

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: Will you be marching on January 21st?
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70de/24c69fd9/fd59561e/18eee9f1/4238836152/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all&source=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all")
---

Peter,

I have some great news: EMILY's List is officially sponsoring the Women's March on Washington!

We're proud to be standing in solidarity with tens of thousands of Americans across the country to make sure that women's voices are heard by the Trump administration and anyone trying to roll back women's rights.

I hope I'll see you and many members of this community out marching later this month -- in Washington, D.C. or in sister marches happening in cities across the country.

**[We want to make sure the EMILY's List community is counted and visible. So let us know: Will you be marching on January 21st?](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70de/24c69fd9/fd59561e/18eee9f2/4238836152/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170104_website_March?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+We+want+to+make+sure+the+EMILYs+List+com&utm_campaign=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all&source=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all")**

For over 30 years, the EMILY's List community has stood firmly against lawmakers who seek to turn back the clock on women's progress. By banding together with feminist women and men across the country, we're amplifying each of our voices and ensuring that women's rights are not left behind.

We can't let anyone -- from extremist Republicans in Congress to the president-elect -- forget that women are watching, and women will be heard.

I hope you'll be able to be part of a march this month.

**Add your name to our march roster today:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/March-Roster](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70de/24c69fd9/fd59561e/18eee9f3/4238836152/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20170104_website_March?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgMarchRoster&utm_campaign=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all&source=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all")**

Thanks,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70de/24c69fd9/fd59561e/18eee9ec/4238836152/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all&source=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70de/24c69fd9/fd59561e/18eee9ed/4238836152/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all&source=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70de/24c69fd9/fd59561e/18eee9ee/4238836152/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all&source=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70de/24c69fd9/fd59561e/18eee9ef/4238836152/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all&source=WQENE104N_digital_email_20170106_SSmarch_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.
